sentences.arabic: نَزَلَ الْمَطَرُ الْغَزِيرُ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ الْجَافَّةِ بَعْدَ طُولِ انْتِظَارٍ.
sentences.translation: Obilna kiša pala je na suhu zemlju nakon dugog iščekivanja.
sentences.translationEn: Heavy rain fell on the dry land after a long wait.

sentences.arabic: بَدَأَتِ الْأَرْضُ تَخْضَرُّ وَتَخْرُجُ مِنْهَا النَّبَاتَاتُ الطَّيِّبَةُ.
sentences.translation: Zemlja je počela zeleniti i iz nje su nikle dobre biljke.
sentences.translationEn: The earth began to turn green and good plants emerged from it.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْمَشْهَدُ يُذَكِّرُنَا بِالْأَمْثَالِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ الْقَدِيمَةِ عَنِ الْخَيْرِ وَالْعَطَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj prizor nas podsjeća na stare arapske poslovice o dobru i davanju.
sentences.translationEn: This scene reminds us of old Arabic proverbs about goodness and giving.

sentences.arabic: الْكَلِمَةُ الطَّيِّبَةُ مِثْلُ الشَّجَرَةِ الْمُثْمِرَةِ الَّتِي تَنْفَعُ النَّاسَ.
sentences.translation: Lijepa riječ je poput plodnog drveta koje koristi ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: A good word is like a fruitful tree that benefits people.

sentences.arabic: يَهْتَمُّ الْأَدَبُ الْعَرَبِيُّ بِرَبْطِ الْإِنْسَانِ بِبِيئَتِهِ وَأَرْضِهِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska književnost se brine o povezivanju čovjeka sa njegovom okolinom i zemljom.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic literature cares about connecting humans with their environment and land.
